commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; maintainers can complete ordinary exact-head check gating and merge handling.; Cleared: No security or supply-chain regression was found; the patch adds no dependencies or permission changes and reduces credential exposure by refusing locally expired bearer tokens. (sha=40d58c6031f575425dbcba7d08ac2485c6c4727a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR combines Grok browser sessions with valid CLI bearer authentication, recognizes credential-related gRPC status-7 failures, parses framed or raw billing protobufs including omitted zero usage, and updates focused tests and guidance.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main only treats status 16 as an authentication failure, sends browser-cookie requests without the available bearer credential, and requires framed response payloads; focused tests and real-provider verification cover those paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; maintainers can complete ordinary exact-head check gating and merge handling.

target.title: Fix Grok web billing status 7 auth and cookie bearer fetch
target.body:
## Summary

- Treat gRPC status 7 OAuth2 `bad-credentials` responses as auth failures without misclassifying scope-denied responses.
- Try browser cookies plus a non-expired bearer token before cookie-only; never transmit expired bearer credentials.
- Accept complete gRPC-web frames and raw protobuf billing responses, including current periods where proto3 omits a zero `credit_usage_percent`.
- Surface actionable grok.com or `grok login` reauthentication guidance.

## Problem

Grok web billing could fail with RPC status 7 even when the user had a current Chrome grok.com session and/or a usable CLI token. Successful billing responses also vary between framed and raw protobuf, and zero usage may omit the scalar percent field.

## Current candidate

Exact head: `40d58c6031f575425dbcba7d08ac2485c6c4727a`, rebased without conflicts onto current `main` at `9b22e65b`.

Post-rebase proof:
- Focused tests: 55 tests in 3 suites passed.
- `make check`: 0 formatting changes and 0 lint violations.
- Autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings (`gpt-5.5`, confidence 0.84).
- Fresh exact-head CI pending.

## Prior full and live proof

The source-equivalent pre-rebase candidate `f6654e969675c00a6976ecddb7b8f766ac7a6372` had:
- Full suite: 3,788 tests in 417 suites passed.
- Release build: passed.
- Public Model Identifier Gate: PASS.
- Signed-app deep code-sign verification: passed.
- Real provider/account verification using the available Chrome grok.com session.
- Final UI showed Grok Credits at `100% left`, a monthly reset countdown, and `Updated just now`.

The rebase only added the debug-build main-thread watchdog already on `main`; it did not conflict with or alter this Grok patch. Fresh exact-head CI remains required before merge.

## Test plan

- `swift test --filter 'GrokWebBillingFetcherTests|GrokAuthTests|CodexUserFacingErrorTests'`
- `swift test`
- `make check`
- `swift build -c release`
- signed-app live verification against grok.com
target.author: bcharleson

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
